title: VerdeLake's Torches+
description: New torches with outline based on the new Redstone Torch.
body:
# ![VerdeLake's Torches+](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7afcc7939518bf418f2c80e56c3799a5c7837824.png)


This texture-pack replaces the default torches in Minecraft with new torches with outline inspired by the Redstone Torch introduced in version 1.21.2.


Fully compatible with Minecraft versions from **1.14** to **26.1**, as well as with **Vanilla**, **Sodium**, and **OptiFine**!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35d8817c1f6738728b410a4e0e31d5637e757a09.png)

## **Redstone Comparator and Repeater**
The new design of the comparator and repeater are also included and backported to older versions.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/365db8e223cf33f839964cf447b11ca3181c7e69.png)

## **Copper Torch**
The new Copper Torch is also updated with the new design.
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/201b6e237db32eedf987f5569bfa507d0125acbd.png)
